general.name: Wi-Fi Profile
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1.0"> <dict> <key>PayloadContent</key> <array/> <key>PayloadDisplayName</key> <string>Test Profile</string> <key>PayloadIdentifier</key> <string>existing-identifier</string> <key>PayloadType</key> <string>Configuration</string> <key>PayloadUUID</key> <string>existing-uuid</string> <key>PayloadVersion</key> <integer>1</integer> </dict> </plist>

self_service.self_service_description: Install this Wi-Fi profile from Self Service
